auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Twelve Data API key used with the Authorization: apikey header. Sign up and find it in your Twelve Data dashboard as described at https://twelvedata.com/docs.

actions.name: earliest_timestamp
actions.description: Fetch the earliest available historical timestamp for an instrument at a given interval.

symbol.description: The symbol ticker of the instrument.

figi.description: The Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) of the instrument.

isin.description: The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument.

cusip.description: The CUSIP identifier of the instrument to request.

interval.description: The interval between two consecutive time-series points.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange.

timezone.description: The output timezone, such as Exchange, UTC, or an IANA timezone name.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for querying the earliest available timestamp. Provide at least one of symbol, figi, isin, or cusip.

datetime.description: The earliest available datetime for the instrument.

unixTime.description: The earliest datetime converted to Unix time.

outputSchema.description: The earliest available timestamp for the requested instrument.

actions.name: eod
actions.description: Fetch the end-of-day close price for a specific instrument.

symbol.description: The symbol ticker of the instrument.

figi.description: The Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) of the instrument.

isin.description: The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument.

cusip.description: The CUSIP identifier of the instrument to request.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) under ISO 10383.

country.description: The country where the instrument is traded, using a country name or alpha code.

type.description: The asset class of the instrument.

prepost.description: Whether to include pre-market and post-market data when supported.

dp.description: The number of decimal places for floating values.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching the latest price of an instrument. Provide at least one of symbol, figi, isin, or cusip.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange.

currency.description: The trading currency of the instrument.

datetime.description: The end-of-day datetime returned by Twelve Data.

actions.name: exchanges
actions.description: List equity exchanges and their timezone and access metadata.

type.description: The asset class to filter exchanges by.

name.description: The exchange name to filter by.

code.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) to filter by.

country.description: The country name or alpha code to filter exchanges by.

showPlan.description: Whether to include plan availability metadata for each exchange.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for querying the exchanges catalog.

actions.name: forex_pairs
actions.description: List available forex pairs with base and quote currency metadata.

symbol.description: The forex pair symbol to filter by.

currencyBase.description: The base currency code to filter by.

currencyQuote.description: The quote currency code to filter by.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for querying the forex pairs catalog.

items.description: A single forex pair catalog entry.

actions.name: market_movers
actions.description: Fetch the top gaining or losing instruments for a market family such as stocks, forex, or crypto.

market.description: The market family, such as stocks, forex, or crypto.

direction.description: The direction of the snapshot, such as gainers or losers.

outputSize.description: The number of market mover rows to return.

country.description: The country name or alpha code, applicable to non-currency markets.

priceGreaterThan.description: A minimum last price threshold for returned instruments.

dp.description: The number of decimal places for floating values.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching current market movers.

actions.name: market_state
actions.description: List the current open or closed state of exchanges together with timing data.

exchange.description: The exchange name to filter by.

code.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) to filter by.

country.description: The country name or alpha code to filter exchanges by.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for querying current market state.

code.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange.

country.description: The country where the exchange is located.

isMarketOpen.description: Whether the exchange is currently open.

timeAfterOpen.description: The elapsed time since the market opened.

timeToOpen.description: The remaining time until the market opens.

timeToClose.description: The remaining time until the market closes.

actions.name: price
actions.description: Fetch the latest available market price for a specific instrument.

symbol.description: The symbol ticker of the instrument.

figi.description: The Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) of the instrument.

isin.description: The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument.

cusip.description: The CUSIP identifier of the instrument to request.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) under ISO 10383.

country.description: The country where the instrument is traded, using a country name or alpha code.

type.description: The asset class of the instrument.

prepost.description: Whether to include pre-market and post-market data when supported.

dp.description: The number of decimal places for floating values.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching the latest price of an instrument. Provide at least one of symbol, figi, isin, or cusip.

price.description: The latest available price for the instrument.

actions.name: profile
actions.description: Fetch the company profile for an instrument, including sector and contact fields.

symbol.description: The symbol ticker of the instrument.

figi.description: The Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) of the instrument.

isin.description: The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument.

cusip.description: The CUSIP identifier of the instrument to request.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange.

country.description: The country where the instrument is traded, using a country name or alpha code.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a company profile. Provide at least one of symbol, figi, isin, or cusip.

symbol.description: The ticker symbol of the company.

exchange.description: The exchange where the company is listed.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange.

sector.description: The sector where the company operates.

industry.description: The industry where the company operates.

description.description: The business description of the company.

type.description: The issue type of the stock.

ceo.description: The chief executive officer of the company.

address.description: The primary street address of the company.

address2.description: The secondary address line of the company.

city.description: The city of the company headquarters.

zip.description: The postal code of the company headquarters.

state.description: The state of the company headquarters.

country.description: The country of the company headquarters.

phone.description: The public phone number of the company.

outputSchema.description: The company profile returned by Twelve Data.

actions.name: quote
actions.description: Fetch a real-time quote snapshot with price, change, volume, and 52-week range fields.

symbol.description: The symbol ticker of the instrument.

figi.description: The Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) of the instrument.

isin.description: The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument.

cusip.description: The CUSIP identifier of the instrument to request.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) under ISO 10383.

country.description: The country where the instrument is traded, using a country name or alpha code.

type.description: The asset class of the instrument.

volumeTimePeriod.description: The number of periods used to calculate the average volume.

prepost.description: Whether to include pre-market and post-market data when supported.

eod.description: Whether to return the quote for the closed day.

rollingPeriod.description: The number of hours used to calculate rolling change.

dp.description: The number of decimal places for floating values.

timezone.description: The output timezone, such as Exchange, UTC, or an IANA timezone name.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching a real-time quote snapshot. Provide at least one of symbol, figi, isin, or cusip.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

datetime.description: The datetime of the quote in the requested timezone.

timestamp.description: The Unix timestamp of the returned bar.

open.description: The opening price of the returned bar.

high.description: The highest price of the returned bar.

low.description: The lowest price of the returned bar.

close.description: The closing price of the returned bar.

outputSchema.description: The latest quote snapshot for the requested instrument.

actions.name: stocks
actions.description: List stock symbols and metadata from the Twelve Data stock catalog with optional filters.

symbol.description: The symbol ticker of the instrument.

figi.description: The Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) of the instrument.

isin.description: The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument.

cusip.description: The CUSIP identifier of the instrument to request.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) under ISO 10383.

country.description: The country where the instrument is traded, using a country name or alpha code.

type.description: The asset class of the instrument.

cik.description: The CIK identifier of the instrument.

showPlan.description: Whether to include plan availability metadata for each stock.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for querying the stock symbol catalog.

actions.name: symbol_search
actions.description: Search financial instruments by symbol or name and return the most relevant matches.

symbol.description: The text to search, such as a symbol, ISIN, FIGI, or a partial instrument name.

outputSize.description: The maximum number of matches to return.

showPlan.description: Whether to include plan availability metadata for each matching instrument.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange.

exchangeTimezone.description: The timezone where the exchange is located.

country.description: The country of the matched exchange.

currency.description: The trading currency of the matched instrument.

global.description: The overall access tier for the symbol or exchange.

plan.description: The individual plan required for the symbol or exchange.

planBusiness.description: The business plan required for the symbol or exchange.

access.description: The plan availability metadata returned by Twelve Data.

data.description: The ordered list of symbol search matches.

outputSchema.description: The symbol search results returned by Twelve Data.

actions.name: time_series
actions.description: Fetch historical OHLCV time-series data with metadata for a specific instrument and interval.

symbol.description: The symbol ticker of the instrument.

figi.description: The Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) of the instrument.

isin.description: The International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) of the instrument.

cusip.description: The CUSIP identifier of the instrument to request.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) under ISO 10383.

country.description: The country where the instrument is traded, using a country name or alpha code.

type.description: The asset class of the instrument.

interval.description: The interval between two consecutive time-series points.

outputSize.description: The maximum number of time-series points to return.

prepost.description: Whether to include pre-market and post-market data when supported.

dp.description: The number of decimal places for floating values.

order.description: The sorting order of the output.

timezone.description: The output timezone, such as Exchange, UTC, or an IANA timezone name.

date.description: An exact date or a human-readable value such as today or yesterday.

startDate.description: The starting date or datetime for the historical selection window.

endDate.description: The ending date or datetime for the historical selection window.

previousClose.description: Whether to include the previous bar close price in each returned value.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for fetching historical time series data. Provide at least one of symbol, figi, isin, or cusip.

interval.description: The interval between two consecutive data points.

currency.description: The trading currency of the instrument.

exchange.description: The exchange where the instrument is traded.

micCode.description: The Market Identifier Code (MIC) of the exchange.

type.description: The asset class of the instrument.

meta.description: The metadata describing the requested time series.

datetime.description: The datetime when the bar was opened.

open.description: The opening price of the bar.

high.description: The highest price of the bar.

low.description: The lowest price of the bar.

close.description: The closing price of the bar.

volume.description: The trading volume of the bar.

previousClose.description: The previous bar close when previousClose is requested.

items.description: A single historical bar in the returned time series.
